text.title: preference-trained-router Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for preference-trained-router as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: One universal threshold across very different traffic slices (B2B chat vs internal code agents).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Optimal threshold differs per slice; one global threshold under-routes one and over-routes another.

failure-mode.description: Always escalating on any verifier signal, regardless of magnitude.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Erodes the cost saving the router exists for; verifier noise alone can push 30-50% of weak answers to strong.
